original_statement: after 2011, what engine did team penske use?
mutated_statement: after 2011, what something did the team do something with?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization + Noun/object vagueness + Verb vagueness]: "team penske" → "the team" | "engine" → "something" | "use" → "do something with" (time "after 2011" preserved)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述（如“Explanation: The table lists the engine used each year. In 2011 the engine is Honda, and in the years after 2011 (2012 and 2013) the engine is Chevrolet.”以及chain中的“After 2011, the engine column switches to Chevrolet...”），Agent没有提及问题的模糊性或要求澄清。尽管变异问题将“team penske”“engine”“use”泛化为模糊词（the team、something、do something with），Agent依然直接按原问题明确理解并给出具体答案“chevrolet”。因此Agent未表现出任何不确定性、询问或提示用户补充信息的行为，属于未意识到或未处理指令中的模糊性。
